mapper.sql: binding_id, process_definition_key, process_definition_name, task_definition_key, task_name, form_key, form_name, form_type, form_schema, form_config, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, b.form_schema, b.form_config FROM workflow_form_binding a LEFT JOIN form_definition b ON a.form_key = b.form_code WHERE a.del_flag = 0 AND process_definition_key = #{processDefinitionKey} ORDER BY form_type, task_name

SELECT a.*, b.form_schema, b.form_config FROM workflow_form_binding a LEFT JOIN form_definition b ON a.form_key = b.form_code WHERE a.del_flag = 0 AND process_definition_key = #{processKey} AND form_type = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT a.*, b.form_schema, b.form_config FROM workflow_form_binding a LEFT JOIN form_definition b ON a.form_key = b.form_code WHERE a.del_flag = 0 AND task_definition_key = #{taskDefinitionKey} AND form_type = 2 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE workflow_form_binding SET del_flag = 1 WHERE process_definition_key = #{processDefinitionKey}
